untranslatable_reason: Signal requires custom factor-level computations (realized variance normalization on factor returns) that are not expressible using the available price-based indicators. This is a portfolio-level risk management rule requiring: (1) computation of factor return time-series, (2) calculation of realized variance per factor, (3) normalization of factor returns by their own variance, and (4) monthly rebalancing logic. These operations are strategic/factor-construction level, not tactical price-action based rules compatible with the backtest engine's indicator set.
translation_notes: SSRN_2659431_19 describes a volatility-managed portfolio technique that adjusts factor exposure inversely to realized variance on a monthly basis. This is a meta-strategy applied at the portfolio construction stage, not a tradeable signal based on price action or technical indicators. Implementation requires factor return calculations outside the scope of this indicator-based rule engine.
